'''gapotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zambra|zambra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zambra|zambra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gapotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpetheth|gæpetheth]] || [[word:gæpethej|gæpethej]] || [[word:gæpethesh|gæpethesh]] || [[word:gæpethe|gæpethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapopothoth|gapopothoth]] || [[word:gapopothoj|gapopothoj]] || [[word:gapopothosh|gapopothosh]] || [[word:gapopotho|gapopotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapothoth|gapothoth]] || [[word:gapothoj|gapothoj]] || [[word:gapothosh|gapothosh]] || [[word:gapotho|gapotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapofthoth|gapofthoth]] || [[word:gapofthoj|gapofthoj]] || [[word:gapofthosh|gapofthosh]] || [[word:gapofthof|gapofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gapothotho|gapothotho]] || [[word:gapothojo|gapothojo]] || [[word:gapothosho|gapothosho]] || [[word:gapothoko|gapothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gapothoth|gapothoth]] || [[word:gapothoj|gapothoj]] || [[word:gapothosh|gapothosh]] || [[word:gapotho|gapotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gapothothol|gapothothol]] || [[word:gapothojol|gapothojol]] || [[word:gapothoshol|gapothoshol]] || [[word:gapothokol|gapothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gapothothotho|gapothothotho]] || [[word:gapothojojo|gapothojojo]] || [[word:gapothoshosho|gapothoshosho]] || [[word:gapothoko|gapothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gapothothon|gapothothon]] || [[word:gapothojon|gapothojon]] || [[word:gapothoshon|gapothoshon]] || [[word:gapothokon|gapothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gapothothoro|gapothothoro]] || [[word:gapothojoro|gapothojoro]] || [[word:gapothoshoro|gapothoshoro]] || [[word:gapothokoro|gapothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
